items.title: This Lenovo Legion Go S Windows gaming handheld is up to $400 less than Steam Deck, now at $550 all-time low
items.summary:
As part of its wider clearance sale, Woot is offering Lenovo’s Legion Go S Windows gaming handheld for $549.99 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). This Glacier White Windows model is almost always out of stock at most retailers, and it typically sells for its full price when it does eventually show up. Unlike the SteamOS version, which has seen a few discounts lately, the Windows model has mostly held near full price. Today’s deal delivers a $180 discount on its usual going rate, landing it $30 below the previous all-time low it briefly hit at Woot earlier this month as part of a similar sale event. This deal also lands at a particularly interesting time, with the Steam Deck recently seeing its price climb as high as $949, making Lenovo’s Windows-powered handheld a much better value at its discounted price today. Head below for more details.

more…

items.title: Razer’s BlackWidow V4 X Minecraft Edition keyboard hits lowest price today at $90 (Save 47%)
items.summary:
Amazon is now offering Razer’s BlackWidow V4 X Minecraft Edition full-size mechanical keyboard for $89.99 shipped. This keyboard is a part of the brand’s Minecraft Edition peripherals, and it typically goes for $170. Today’s offer knocks $80 off the usual price and drops it $49 below its previous all-time low. While we’ve seen discounts on the standard BlackWidow V4 X and other Pro variants before, this particular full-sized model with the Minecraft-themed elements hasn’t seen many discounts. It’s now available at the lowest price we have tracked for it to date, so be sure to snag it after getting more details below.
